CustomField.description: When non-null, this work item is predecisional (proposal-staging only) and must not be ingested into orgs that have not enabled predecisional ingest on DeliveryHubSettings__c. The timestamp records when the record was marked predecisional. Travels with the record via the sync field set so receivers can enforce the gate locally.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time when this item is for proposal staging only. Receiving orgs without predecisional ingest enabled will refuse the inbound write.
CustomField.label: Marked Predecisional
